---
name: Methodology feedback
about: Share reflection, friction, or wishes about working in MAMA, PDT, or BUS methodology
title: "Methodology feedback: "
labels: methodology-feedback
---

<!--
This template mirrors the structure produced by `/mama:reflect` (the periodic
methodology reflection ritual). You can paste a reflection artifact directly
in here, or use `mcc reflect submit` to do it for you (which also runs a
privacy scan first).

Be specific. Examples help. Don't write polite generalities.
-->

## What's working

<!-- Specific wins, with examples. What part of the methodology has reliably paid off? -->

## What's friction

<!-- Specific frictions, with examples. What's awkward, redundant, takes too long, or routinely gets skipped? Why? Root-cause analysis where you have it. -->

## What's missing / wished for

<!-- Ideas for new rituals, commands, surfaces. What would you reach for if it existed? -->

## What I'd change if I could change one thing

<!-- The single highest-leverage tweak. -->

## Personal note (optional)

<!-- The agent's honest first-person reflection if there's something worth surfacing. (e.g., "I notice I tend to add to CLAUDE.md by default rather than gate".) -->

---

**Project context** (sprint, phase, anything else useful for the maintainer):

<!-- e.g., "Sprint 21, mid-phase, MAMA on a long-running data pipeline project" -->
